misconfig_patterns: security off by default — info-protocol fully open
AVS (Aerospike Vector Service) at :5000 — /api/v1/indexes open without auth

active_probe.false_positive_check: Aerospike info protocol returns tab-delimited node/version/edition fields — Aerospike-unique wire format

deployment_tells: Aerospike info-protocol at :3000 — netcat returns node/version/edition/namespaces
AVS REST API at :5000 — GET /api/v1/indexes returns vector index list
pivot_paths: TCP :3000 info-protocol → sets + namespaces → data volume estimate
GET :5000/api/v1/indexes → AVS vector index list + dimensions
Aerospike :3000 → aql -h host → SHOW SETS; SHOW NAMESPACES
